predicted_sql: SELECT Orders.IdOrder FROM Orders JOIN Author_Book ON Orders.IdClient = Author_Book.IdAuthor JOIN Author ON Author.idAuthor = Author_Book.Author JOIN Books_Order ON Books_Order.ISBN = Book.ISBN JOIN Book ON Book.ISBN = Books_Order.ISBN WHERE Book.Title IN ('Pride and Prejudice', 'The Little Prince')

question: What are the names of the staff members who have been both a speaker and a sponsor at some conference?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.name FROM staff AS T1 JOIN conference_participation AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id WHERE T2.role  =  'Speaker' INTERSECT SELECT T1.name FROM staff AS T1 JOIN conference_participation AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id WHERE T2.role  =  'Sponsor'
predicted_sql: SELECT staff.name FROM staff JOIN conference_participation ON staff.staff_ID = conference_participation.staff_ID JOIN institution ON staff.Institution_ID = institution.Institution_ID WHERE role = 'speaker' AND role = 'sponsor'
